message:
fix(sync): disable JSONL imports in dolt-native mode, keep local writes as safety net

In dolt-native sync mode, auto-import from JSONL could overwrite dolt data
with stale JSONL content. This splits the export/import concerns:

- Local JSONL file writes (autoflush) always happen as a safety net backup
- Git-based JSONL sync (commit/push/pull) stays disabled in dolt-native
- All JSONL import paths are now guarded in dolt-native mode

Adds ShouldImportJSONL() and config.NeedsJSONLImport() helpers with tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
